title: Customer due diligence form for affordable housing grant funding
body: "You must download, complete and return the ‘Affordable housing grant funding customer due diligence — know your customer (KYC) form’ when applying for affordable housing grant funding from Homes England.  Find out about information you need to provide, the checks we carry out and when we may need to share your information.  How to complete this form  Make sure you complete all sections of the form as missing information will lead to delays.  How to return this form  Your completed form should be returned by email to AHPKYC@homesengland.gov.uk.  Send certified copies of any documents that are required. We do not need originals.  "
